content:
✔ Why This Matters:
• Some players will unknowingly be on a story arc that unfolds over time.
• They can try to fight against their fate, but it will always find a way to manifest.
• Creates hidden layers of storytelling.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Adds unexpected twists and structure to the class narrative.
✔ Keeps the game feeling dynamic.
✔ Encourages students to make creative, thematic choices.

📜 5. Reverse of Fortunes – Weekly Chaos Events That Shift Power

📜 Every week, a randomized event can cause a total reversal of power.

✔ Types of Reverse Fortune Events:
1️⃣ The Fall of a Giant → The highest-ranked student loses their XP lead due to an event.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 487 (chunk 487/555)
